top_signals.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs record worst month since debut, shedding $4.5 billion in June
top_signals.summary: Analysts cited capital rotation amid macroeconomic uncertainty and SpaceX's historic IPO as the main drivers of the significant outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin just $5K away from ‘best investment opportunity’ of bear market
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin's recent selloff brought it within 10% of its realized price — a line that has marked the bottoming zone in Bitcoin's previous bear markets.

top_signals.summary: If Andy Burnham focuses on AI, devolution and regional development, he has a chance to turn British stagnation around – and his record in Manchester is cause for cautious optimism, says Steve Rigby The transition to our seventh prime minister in a decade is now well underway. top_signals.title: Two Uzbekistani London debuts delayed to next year
top_signals.summary: The eagerly anticipated London listings of two Uzbekistani state-owned companies have been pushed back to 2027, the country’s deputy prime minister has said, despite the successful public debut of its national investment fund earlier this year.
